Description: K-type termopar-forsterker (CHT1 CHT2 CHT3 CHT4 EGT1)
Optokoppler for RPM — isolerer tenningsspole (opptil 400V spiker)
N-kanal MOSFET for viftestyring 30V/5.7A logikknivå (maks ~3A vifte — for større vifte bruk AOD4184 C88329)
Avkoplingskondensator VCC for MAX31855 (én per IC)
Pull-up til +5V for NTC-sensorer (Olje Temp + IAT)
Øvre del spenningsdeler — Lambda / Innovate LC-2 (5V→3.3V)
Div. pull-up og pull-down: RPM anode (R10), RPM collector (R11), MOSFET gate pull-down (R16), reserve (R17)
Seriemotstand MOSFET-gate (beskytter ESP32 GPIO mot overspenning)

Reference(s): J1 J2 J3 J4 J5 J6 J7 J8 J17
Description: Sensor-innganger + vifte: J1=12V inn, J2=Olje Temp, J3=IAT, J4=Olje Trykk, J5=Lambda, J6=Batteri, J7=Tank, J8=RPM, J17=Vifte
K-type termopar-innganger: J9=CHT1, J10=CHT2, J11=CHT3, J12=CHT4, J16=EGT1
Sokkel for WT32-ETH01 modul (2 stk × 1×20 = 1 stk 2×20 sokkel)
